name: saas-platform
description: Modular SaaS Platform — Multi-tenant, multi-app, production-ready

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:gateway && npm run install:app1 && npm run install:app2
scripts.install:app2: cd apps/app2-urlshortener && npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,app1,app2 -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:app1" "npm run dev:app2"
scripts.build: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:app1 && npm run build:app2
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
